out_of_scope_note: Software pipeline / tool release paper (SIPEC): a deep-learning architecture for segmentation, identification, pose-estimation, and behavior classification of mice and non-human primates from raw video. No theoretical framework of brain function, no perceptual/decision/encoding/cognitive claim — pure computer-vision tooling for behavioral video analysis. Falls under the synopsis prompt's explicit OOS categories (software pipelines/tooling baselines; pure-ML papers without biological neural content).
